articles.title: IOTA and Shimmer: Laying the Groundwork for Growth
articles.description: 2023 has been a revolutionary year for IOTA. From the launch of ShimmerEVM and its smart contracts to Stardust bringing tokenization to the IOTA mainnet, we have a lot to cover in our annual review.

articles.title: ATOM Accelerator DAO Enhances Cosmos Ecosystem through Community-Driven Initiative
articles.description: The Cosmos community has approved a significant allocation of over 975,000 ATOM tokens to establish the ATOM Accelerator DAO (AADAO), marking a major step forward in the evolution of the Cosmos ecosystem. The initiative is poised to create a long-lasting, community-owned organization dedicated to nurturing and advancing the Cosmos Hub and its native ATOM token. […]
